channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: Living Water:Commentary on Orthodox Services

item.title: Living Water, Harrowing Of Hell, Delivered From Deception By His Compassions, 2011-09-17
item.description: :Living Water. Harrowing Of Hell, Delivered From Deception By His Compassions, 2011-09-17
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Living Water. Harrowing Of Hell, Delivered From Deception By His Compassions, 2011-09-17

item.title: Living Water, 2011-10-19
item.description: :Living Water. In the last litany of Vespers and Matins we pray "That the whole evening may be perfect, holy, peaceful and sinless, let us ask of the Lord." Why do we pray this prayer, when past experience tells us that it will not be fulfilled today? Do we mean what we say, or are these just words? We look into the meaning and intent of this prayer and why it is so important. We should understand what we pray, why we pray and what we must do to indicate to the Lord that we mean what we pray.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Living Water. In the last litany of Vespers and Matins we pray "That the whole evening may be perfect, holy, peaceful and sinless, let us ask of the Lord." Why do we pray this prayer, when past experience tells us that it will not be fulfilled today? Do we mean what we say, or are these just words? We look into the meaning and intent of this prayer and why it is so important. We should understand what we pray, why we pray and what we must do to indicate to the Lord that we mean what we pray.

item.title: Living Water, Free Among The Dead, 2011-11-19
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland

item.title: Living Water, 2014-11-13
item.description: :Living Water. We look in detail at the petition from the Great Ectenia: "That we may be delivered from all tribulation, wrath, and necessity, let us pray to the Lord. "
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Living Water. We look in detail at the petition from the Great Ectenia: "That we may be delivered from all tribulation, wrath, and necessity, let us pray to the Lord. "
